raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I received an email indicating my Citi Business card was charged via XXXX for {$10.00} to XXXX XXXX. This was an unauthorized charge and was not made by me the account holder. I attempted to initiate " dispute charge '' via my Citi app but was not successful. The Citi system indicated it would have to transition from pending charge to posted in order to resolve. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received a second email indicating my Citi card was charged for unauthorized purchases on XXXX for {$24.00}. Again I attempted to resolve this through the Citi app. I followed the app process to dispute the charges, close the account and issue a new card but over XXXX attempts were each met with a system error and it would not proceed. Several phone calls to Citi using Citi provided phone numbers on XX/XX/XXXX were unsuccessful. Each attempt was a wrong department that would not handle my issue to close the account, issue a new card and resolve the unauthorized charges. The only action I was successful in completing was locking my Citi credit card for all future use. 

I possess proof that through XXXX and XXXX that I did not make these charges and they were not involved with my existing merchant accounts. Attached XXXX and XXXX screenshots reflect the most recent purchases I have made. Neither show that i have authorized a charge mentioned above. 

Additional phone calls to Citi were made on XX/XX/XXXX using Citi provided phone numbers. Again, each provided phone number was to the incorrect department with the representative unable to help. Additional unsuccessful attempts were made using the Citi app to resolve this issue. Error messages were received in the app in addition to one message indicating I must call or write to speak with a representative.

This account has been open for over 25 years and will result in impacts to my credit score if it is to be fully closed due to Citi unable to resolve this issue.
